source.body_text_sample:
Homepage
Products
Learning
Support
Events
About
Work at Rocscience

People are at the heart of Rocscience, and we are committed to their success and development. We empower them to be the best they can be, enabling them to create a meaningful difference not only for their clients, colleagues, and communities, but also for their own careers and aspirations.

Careers
Internships
Our culture

At Rocscience, we embrace openness, approachability, and diversity, fostering an inclusive environment where every voice is celebrated. This has resulted in a team of long-term members empowered to thrive in a valued and supportive workplace.

As much as we work diligently, when it is time to unwind, we unleash our competitive spirit with rounds of ping-pong, air hockey, pinball, or basketball.

What's it like working at Rocscience?
Ideas are golden.
We're always looking for ways to do things better. Your expertise and ideas are welcome, and the door is always open.
Egos are left at the door.
Whether you're an engineer with a Ph.D or just starting your career, you'll be joining an approachable team where questions can be asked, knowledge shared, and both individual and team successes are celebrated.
Work hard, rest hard.
We value a healthy work-life balance. When you're working, be switched on and focused and when you're offline - you are truly offline.
Join our team

What are you waiting for? If you are looking to join a vibrant, rapidly growing tech company that will recognize your impact
